title: SlimeVR flashing-tool board configuration
description: Manufacturing flashing/verification config. Reuses the firmware board-defaults schema for the board values and adds the build target plus verification probes.

type.description: PlatformIO environment / board to build and flash.

tests.description: Verification probe source paths (relative to this repo root, under probes/) flashed in order before shipping firmware.

productionVerify.description: Interactive serial verification after production firmware is flashed. Omit to skip production verification.

bootFragments.description: Serial line fragments that must appear after boot (initial and post-factory-reset).

postBootDelaySeconds.description: Seconds to wait after boot fragments are seen before sending serial commands.

bootTimeoutSeconds.description: Seconds to wait for boot fragments after reset.

expectedSensor0Imu.description: IMU name Sensor[0] must report (e.g. LSM6DSV).

minWifiNetworks.description: Minimum WiFi networks GET WIFISCAN must report (count >= this value).

defaults.description: Board values block (same shape as board-defaults.json) injected at build time via SLIMEVR_OVERRIDE_DEFAULTS.
